title: Add Hybrid category and new art studio business

requirements.summary: Add 'Hybrid' cuisine filter button to SearchBar component
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Hybrid' cuisine filter button appears in the SearchBar component
The button can be toggled on/off independently like other cuisine filters
The button styling matches existing cuisine filter buttons

file_operations.description: Add 'Hybrid' as a cuisine filter button alongside existing cuisine options (bar, pub, cafe, winery, etc.), maintaining the same visual style and toggle behavior as other cuisine filter buttons.

requirements.summary: Update cuisine filtering logic to support Hybrid category
acceptanceCriteria: When the 'Hybrid' cuisine filter is active, only restaurants with cuisine type 'Hybrid' are displayed
The 'Hybrid' filter works independently and in combination with other active filters

file_operations.description: Include 'Hybrid' (mapped to Cuisine.hybrid from backend enum) in the cuisine filtering logic so restaurants with cuisine type 'Hybrid' are returned when the Hybrid filter is active. Ensure it works independently and in combination with other filters.

requirements.summary: Display generated hybrid art studio image in RestaurantCard
acceptanceCriteria: The new Hybrid restaurant displays the generated art studio image
The image renders correctly in the RestaurantCard component using the imageURL field

file_operations.description: Ensure the RestaurantCard component correctly renders the imageURL from the restaurant data. The new Hybrid restaurant entry will have imageURL set to 'frontend/public/assets/generated/hybrid-art-studio.dim_800x600.png', which should render as a static asset using the existing img src logic in the component.
